name: Hummus Dip (Dupree)
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces garbanzo beans, drained and rinsed
1 tablespoon chopped fresh cilantro, for garnish
1 tablespoon extra virgin olive oil, for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl of a food processor, begin to process the garbanzo beans. Gradually add 1/4 cup hot water to obtain a light, spreadable consistency.
2. Add lemon juice, garlic, peanut butter, sesame oil, cumin, and cayenne. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Process until well blended and smooth.
4. Mound the spread in a serving bowl or on a platter.
5. Surround with pita chips.
6. Sprinkle with green onions, cilantro, and olive oil.
